title: Best trails near Duwamish Head
content: The bathrooms were open and clean. We enjoyed all the new plantings and Seattle Skyline Overlook viewpoint. Walking along the Alki trail had a mix of walkers,

title: Duwamish Head in West Seattle
content: A long stretch of golden sand to the west of Seattle. Head to this beautiful spot to escape the crowds of the city and enjoy good food, sunshine and a fun day

title: Duwamish Longhouse and Cultural Center - Seattle
content: Boasting a wonderful museum, art gallery, gift shop, and gathering space, the Duwamish Longhouse is a must see!

title: I walked out along Duwamish Head to watch the herons ...
content: I'm always in awe of the grace, patience and skill these birds show while living their best life here on Alki.

title: DUWAMISH LONGHOUSE & CULTURAL CENTER
content: The real and original tribe of Seattle. i've had the pleasure of participating in several events here at the Duwamish Long House, and I'm never disappointed.
